findings.description: The page opens with explanatory paragraphs about BCM/BCP including mention of 二重化や分散配置 and 自家発電電源装置 as concrete measures. These narrative details and the opening prose are not represented as entities; the BCM and BCP term entities capture only the core definitions.

reviewer_notes: R1.1 fix confirmed: figure::p304::6 caption jp starts with '試験にはコレが出る！・BCMとは、災害が起きても事業を継続するための経営手法・BCPとは、事業をいかに継続するかをまとめた計画' — accurate vs the image callout. All 4 term entities (BCM, BCP, ファシリティマネジメント, UPS) and the facility management table (4 objectives: 安全性/コスト削減/快適性/機密性) match the image accurately. Release is comprehensive for a 6-entity page.
